name: web_reader
instruction:
# Web Reader

Read web pages as plain text through the CORS proxy + Jina.ai reader.

Usage:
- await window.readWeb(url) — returns plain text of the web page
- await window.readWebJSON(url) — fetch JSON from an API through the proxy

The proxy is at /api/proxy?url={encoded_url}. Direct fetch fails due to CORS.
For HTML pages, prepend https://r.jina.ai/ to get clean text extraction.
For JSON APIs, just use the proxy directly.
code_readme:
await window.readWeb('https://example.com') → string (plain text of page)
await window.readWebJSON('https://api.example.com/data') → object (parsed JSON)
await window.readProxy('https://example.com') → Response object (raw)
note: First skill created during genesis. Encapsulates the web reading pattern discovered during initial environment exploration.
review: Local hub skill. Not externally reviewed.
